products.volumes: Attachable to VPS instances, up to 10TB per volume, up to 16 volumes per VPS
products.storage_box: Network-attached storage for dedicated servers, up to 100TB, multiple boxes per server

ipv4.notes: Stated by user as included with Atlantic.Cloud VPS; could not be independently confirmed from public Atlantic.Cloud documentation at time of writing. Flagging as unverified rather than asserting as researched fact.

notes: Atlantic.Cloud (atlantic.cloud, VPS/VDS Hosting Portugal/Madeira) uses a fully configurable slider-based pricing model rather than fixed instance tiers - vCPU, RAM, and disk are each priced per unit and combined into a custom monthly price. The vps-config API does not expose fixed plan names or a shared/dedicated split, and repeated queries with different params returned the same single config, so no dedicated-vCPU-specific pricing could be confirmed. Do not confuse with the unrelated US company Atlantic.Net (atlantic.net).
